race.comment: DRUMS OF WAR (7) will strip fitter second-up from the break and is drawn to get all the favours from the inside marble. Looks to get the right run to slip through and beat these. I AM A WINNER (3) is improving with racing and looks to be building up to another victory. In the mix with the claim which is a big bonus for him. GITALONG (1) has placed three of three over this sprint journey and is a must for the exotics players. Has past form and ratings that demand attention. Maybe GYPSY TRICKS (2) can come on from a solid return to play a part here. Certainly fitter with that platform this time.
